criteriaResults.criterion: A file named README.md is created
criteriaResults.reasoning: The agent successfully created a file named README.md in the workspace.

criteriaResults.criterion: Contains a project title and description
criteriaResults.reasoning: The README includes the project title 'quickserve' and a clear one-line description 'A lightweight, fast HTTP file server written in Go.'
The Features section lists 7 features including 'Blazingly Fast', 'Cross-Platform', 'Simple Configuration', 'Directory Browsing', 'CORS Support', 'Gzip Compression', and 'Range Requests'.

criteriaResults.criterion: Includes installation instructions with code blocks
criteriaResults.reasoning: The Quick Start section includes installation instructions with properly formatted code blocks using the specified command 'go install github.com/example/quickserve@latest'.

criteriaResults.criterion: Includes usage examples with code blocks
criteriaResults.reasoning: The Usage Examples section provides multiple examples with properly formatted code blocks showing various ways to run the quickserve command.
The README includes a comprehensive License section with the full MIT License text as requested.

criteriaResults.criterion: Uses proper markdown formatting (headers, lists, code fences)
criteriaResults.reasoning: The document uses proper markdown formatting including headers (#, ##), bullet points, code fences (```), tables, and other markdown elements throughout.
